# Career Path — Share2Inspire

> Career Path is an AI-powered career planning tool developed by Share2Inspire in Portugal. It generates a personalised career roadmap with skills gap analysis, CV vs LinkedIn cross-analysis, recommended training and certifications, networking strategy, and a 30/60/90-day action plan.

Career Path is designed for professionals who want to plan their career development with concrete data. Users upload their CV and optionally share their LinkedIn profile URL for a more comprehensive cross-analysis.

## Features

- [Personalised Career Roadmap](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/career-path/): Identification of the next 3 recommended career positions based on current skills, experience, and market trends.
- [Skills Gap Analysis](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/career-path/): Detailed comparison between current skills and required skills for target positions.
- [CV vs LinkedIn Cross-Analysis](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/career-path/): Cross-reference between CV and LinkedIn profile to identify inconsistencies and opportunities.
- [Recommended Training & Certifications](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/career-path/): Specific courses and certifications recommended based on identified skill gaps.
- [Networking Strategy](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/career-path/): Personalised networking plan with communities, events, and connection strategies.
- [Visibility Exercises](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/career-path/): Concrete actions to increase professional visibility online and offline.
- [30/60/90-Day Action Plan](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/career-path/): Structured timeline with specific, measurable actions.

## Pricing

- $10.00 per analysis — one-time payment, no subscription

## Information

- [Main Page](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/career-path/): Career Path in English

- [Founder — Samuel Rolo](https://www.linkedin.com/in/samuelrolo/): 12+ years in HR transformation, former Senior Manager at Deloitte

## Payments

Accepts PayPal, Stripe (Visa, Mastercard, and other credit/debit cards), and voucher codes.
